zh.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres是Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres和Maria Ebriaci di Pisa的兒子，於大約1128年出生在義大利薩德尼亞阿波亞。他於1185年與Spella在義大利薩德尼亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1218年11月10日之前在義大利薩德尼亞，埋葬在義大利薩德尼亞薩薩里阿爾達拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres是Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres和Maria Ebriaci di Pisa的儿子，于大约1128年出生在意大利薩德尼亞阿波亞。他于1185年与Spella在意大利薩德尼亞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1218年11月10日之前在意大利薩德尼亞，埋葬在意大利薩德尼亞薩薩里阿爾達拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Comita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yoko, Koichi, Masao, Minoru, Akira, Eiji, Hideo, Hiroko, Hiroshi, Junichi, Katsuji, Kenji.
Japanese: written 富田 ‘abundant rice paddy’, a common placename. The surname occurs mostly in eastern Japan.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres was born about 1128, in Arborea, Sardinia, Italy as the son of Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres and Maria Ebriaci di Pisa. He married Spella in 1185, in Sardinia, Italy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 10 November 1218, in Sardinia, Italy, and was buried in Ardara, Sassari, Sardinia, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres est né environ 1128, à Arborea, Sardegna, Italie, fils de Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres et Maria Ebriaci di Pisa. Il a épousé Spella en 1185, à Sardegna, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 10 novembre 1218, à Sardegna, Italie, et a été enterré à Ardara, Sassari, Sardegna, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres wurde um 1128 in Arborea, Sardinien, Italien, als Sohn von Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres und Maria Ebriaci di Pisa geboren. Er hat 1185 in Sardinien, Italien Spella geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 10. November 1218 in Sardinien, Italien und wurde in Ardara, Sassari, Sardinien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres è nato il circa 1128 nel Arborea, Sardegna, Italia come figlio di Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres e Maria Ebriaci di Pisa. Lui sposato Spella nel 1185, nel Sardegna, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 10 novembre 1218, nel Sardegna, Italia, e fu sepolto a Ardara, Sassari, Sardegna, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torresは約1128年にイタリアサルデグナアルボアアでRev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of TorresとMaria Ebriaci di Pisaの息子として生まれた。1185年にイタリアサルデグナでSpellaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1218年11月10日以前にイタリアサルデグナで死去し，イタリアサルデグナサッサリアルダラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres(은)는 대략 1128년 이탈리아 사르데그나 아볼이에서 Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres(와)과 Maria Ebriaci di Pisa의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1185년 이탈리아 사르데그나에서 Spella(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1218년 11월 10일 이전 이탈리아 사르데그나에서 사망했으며 이탈리아 사르데그나 사사리 아더라에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1128–before 10 November 1218: ойролцоогоор 1128 он–1218 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 10–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres nasceu aproximadamente 1128, em Arborea, Sardegna, Itália filho de Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres e Maria Ebriaci di Pisa. Ele casou-se com Spella em 1185, em Sardegna, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 10 de novembro de 1218, em Sardegna, Itália, e foi sepultado em Ardara, Sassari, Sardegna, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres родился около 1128 г. в местности арбореа, сардегна, Италия. Его родителей звали Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres и Maria Ebriaci di Pisa. Он женился на женщине по имени Spella в 1185 г. в местности сардегна, Италия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 10 ноябрь 1218 г. в местности сардегна, Италия и был похоронен в местности ардара, сассари, сардегна, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Comita III de Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres nació aproximadamente 1128, en Arborea, Sardegna, Italia como hijo de Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres y Maria Ebriaci di Pisa. Se casó con Spella en 1185, en Sardegna, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 10 de noviembre de 1218, en Sardegna, Italia, y fue sepultado en Ardara, Sassari, Sardegna, Italia.
